message:
fix: Avoid pointless discard for variable args in collections

UserDict, UserList, and OrderedDict now check if argument is a variable
name before wrapping in discard block. This fixes "pointless discard of
local variable" errors when the variable is used elsewhere in the code.

Pattern: Instead of always using h.discard() which generates:
  discard_N: { _ = var; break :discard_N init(); }

Now checks if arg is a variable name and emits plain init():
  hashmap_helper.StringHashMap(*runtime.PyObject).init(...)

This matches the existing pattern used by genDefaultdict.
